step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("evidence on effect of stopping inhaled glucocorticoids on COVID-19 outcomes in asthmatic or COPD patients")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First state whether you agree or disagree with the original conclusion. Then give one clear sentence of reasoning supported by the evidence. Finally, present your selected option using \boxed{} format.
I agree with the original conclusion that patients should not be advised to stop inhaled glucocorticoids to prevent COVID-19. Discontinuation would likely result in uncontrolled airway inflammation and increased risk of exacerbations, potentially leading to worse outcomes during viral infections, even if direct evidence linking ICS to reduced SARS-CoV-2 acquisition is lacking.
